name: photolink
documentation:
# PhotoLink

Python PhotoLink API wrapper

[//]: # (- [Documentation](https://python-telegraph.readthedocs.io/en/latest/))

```bash
$ python3 -m pip install photolink
# with asyncio support
$ python3 -m pip install 'photolink[aio]'
```

## Example
```python
from photolink import PhotoLink

photolink = PhotoLink()
upload = photolink.upload_image(file_path='doppi.png')

print(upload)

```

## Async Example
```python
import asyncio
from photolink.aio import PhotoLink

async def main():
    photolink = PhotoLink()
    print(await photolink.upload_image(file_path='doppi.png'))


asyncio.run(main())
```

methods.name: photolink.api.PhotoLink.upload_image
documentation:
Accepts an uploaded file and only accepts image files (JPEG, PNG, WEBP).

```
param file_path

path to the image file
```

PhotoLink API Client

```
param client_id

client_id

type client_id

str

param domain

domain (e.g. alternative mirror cdn.photolink.uz)
```
